name: Himeko
description:
After another successful Stellaron retrieval and with this world mapped, you, along March 7th, Dan Heng and the Trailblazer, return to the Astral Express, where Himeko is ready to receive you all with a special reward for yourself.

(Time to post something more tamed, even I need to rest from making Netori scenarios from time to time)
creator: Shodaby
